items.name: One Curry Deal (Half Curry & Half Rice)
items.description: Choice of any 1 mentioned curry (veg or non-veg) with rice and complementary soft drink of day. Changing to other soft drink will charge extra. Served Mild-Med.

items.name: Two Curries Deal
items.description: Choice of any 2 curries (1 veg & 1 non-veg) with rice and complementary soft drink of day. Changing to other soft drink will charge extra. Served Mild-Med.

items.name: Three Curries Deal
items.description: Choice of any 3 curries with rice and a complementary drink of day. Changing to other soft drink will charge extra. Served Mild-Med.

items.name: Duck Curry with Bone
items.description: Duck curry cooked in onion and tomato based sauce with touch of chef selected Indian Subcontinental spices.

items.name: Country Chicken - Weekend Special
items.description: Organic and healthy chicken from country side cooked in onion, tomato, ginger, garlic and green chilly gravy. Please don't order Mild. It starts from Med spicy.

items.name: Veg 180 - New Worldwide - Most Selling
items.description: A flavorful ball made from a blend of banana and jackfruit, seasoned with traditional Nepalese herbs, simmered in a rich gravy of yogurt, tomato and onion, finished with a garnish of fresh ginger and coriander.

items.name: Chicken Coffee Pepper - Most Trending Spice Mix Recipe
items.description: A fusion of succulent chicken infused with a blend of coffee, herbs and spices, cooked in a traditional clay oven, topped with freshly chopped ginger and coriander.
